name: Mittelstand Cloud Adoption (Germany)
description: Germany's upper Mittelstand (500-5,000 employees) undergoing first major cloud transformation. These companies often run on-premises SAP and legacy infrastructure, need trusted German-speaking partners, and prioritize data sovereignty and operational continuity over cutting-edge innovation.

segmentation.buyer_profile: Geschaeftsfuehrer (Managing Director), IT-Leiter, Head of Digitalization
drivers: First cloud migration from purely on-premises landscapes
SAP S/4HANA deadline pressure with limited internal SAP expertise
Skilled IT staff shortage driving managed-service demand
Cost efficiency through cloud consumption models

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on German Mittelstand IT spend and cloud adoption rates

tam.description: Total IT spend by upper Mittelstand companies in Germany (~EUR 12B)

sam.description: Cloud migration, managed services, and SAP hosting for Mittelstand segment

som.description: Capturable share leveraging Deutsche Telekom brand trust and German-language service delivery

competitive_landscape: All for One Group, Bechtle, Computacenter, CANCOM, Arvato Systems, Claranet, local system houses
